data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. SHEVCHENKO HAYZE jumped from this box and scrambled home to a narrow Grade 3/4 win at this track over 407m latest (23.74). Tough to beat again. 5. ROXY CAMBLA is progressing well and looks close to another win after hitting the frame last run (23.80) at this track. Form here at this distance is sound. Can feature again. 1. LISSY'S GEM has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing seventh (25.02) in a Grade 4 at this track. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Will give the top chances plenty to think about. 2. WANGAROA WALLY boasts a solid strike-rate over this track and distance.","runners":[7,5,1,2],"exclusive":false}
